exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your study abroad planning forward
items: Research and identify 5-7 countries or regions that align with your academic goals and personal interests
Schedule a meeting with your academic advisor to discuss study abroad credit transfer and degree requirements
Create a preliminary budget breakdown including tuition, housing, meals, travel, and personal expenses for your top 3 destination choices
Research and document language requirements for your target programs and assess your current proficiency level
Research and contact the international student services office at your home institution to understand available support and resources
Create a timeline mapping out all application deadlines, visa requirements, and preparation milestones for your top 3 program choices
